title: haplopappus scrobiculatus
intro: Haplopappus scrobiculatus, also known as the rough fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Haplopappus scrobiculatus are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Haplopappus scrobiculatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
